title: Pleomele thalioides

It belongs to the genus Pleomele, which is a group of flowering plants known for their decorative and architectural value. As a member of the Asparagaceae family, Pleomele thalioides shares characteristics with other plants in this family, such as the presence of underground stems and rhizomes. This plant is further classified into the order Asparagales, which is a group of monocotyledonous flowering plants. Within the genus Pleomele, Pleomele thalioides is one of several species that are valued for their unique foliage and growth habits.
